hero.title: Frontend Engineer
hero.subtitle: I build fast, accessible, and well-architected interfaces.

about.title: About me
about.body: I'm a Frontend Engineer focused on performance and design. I started learning on my own in 2021, then continued my studies through Alura, enrolled in a Computer Science degree program, and currently work as a Frontend Developer. I have also worked as a programming and robotics instructor at Ctrl+Play and have built a portfolio of personal and client projects. I am always looking for opportunities to learn and grow in the technology field.
